items.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
items.original_summary: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks. | 语言: Python | Stars: 7,717 | Forks: 576 | 5,257 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: 现在各种 AI Agent 满天飞，装个 skill 不知道背后有没有恶意代码。NVIDIA 这个安全扫描器专门审计 agent skill 的 prompt injection、危险 tool 调用、权限越权等问题，能在加载前拦截。跟传统 SAST 比它懂 agent 协议规范（function calling 模式），后端做 Agent 平台或者公司内部允许员工装第三方 skill 时，拿这个加一道 CI 卡点很合适。

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.original_summary: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. | 语言: Python | Stars: 32,417 | Forks: 2,183 | 9,475 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: LLM 调用贵在 token 数，agent 日志和工具输出经常动辄几万个 token。这个压缩库在送到 LLM 之前把重复日志、JSON 噪声、RAG 文档做去重和摘要，官方数据节省 60-95% token，答案准确度基本不掉。提供 Python 库、HTTP 代理、MCP server 三种接入方式，成本敏感的后端团队插一层代理就能立竿见影降成本。
items.backend_focus: LLM 调用贵在 token 数，agent 日志和工具输出经常动辄几万个 token。这个压缩库在送到 LLM 之前把重复日志、JSON 噪声、RAG 文档做去重和摘要，官方数据节省 60-95% token，答案准确度基本不掉。提供 Python 库、HTTP 代理、MCP server 三种接入方式，成本敏感的后端团队插一层代理就能立竿见影降成本。

items.chinese_summary: 收集了 Claude、GPT、Gemini、Grok、Cursor、Copilot 等主流 AI 产品的 system prompt 原文，持续更新。做 AI 应用最头疼的就是 prompt 工程，参考官方底层 prompt 比自己瞎试高效十倍，特别是 Claude Code 和 Codex 的工具调用指令设计。后端集成 AI 功能时，可以借鉴这些 prompt 里的安全约束和工具描述写法，少踩坑。

meta.daily_headline: 开发接入与工程实操，前沿快讯与行业动向成为当天主线

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.original_summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 联合 Molecule.one 用 GPT-5.4 做了个“近自主 AI 化学家”，在药物化学关键反应上取得突破。纯研究类成果，跟后端工程基本无关，跳过即可。
items.backend_focus: 无直接后端影响，仅作科研动态了解。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.original_summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 发布 LifeSciBench，一个专家编写并审核的生命科学 AI 评测基准。Benchmark 本身不直接产生工程价值，但如果你们在做医疗/生科方向 LLM 选型，可以拿它做对比。
items.backend_focus: 如果在做生科垂类模型选型，可加入评测矩阵；普通业务后端可忽略。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 提出 Deployment Simulation：用真实对话数据模拟部署，在模型上线前预测行为。这是 OpenAI 内部安全/评测方法论，包装大于实质，对集成方没有新 API。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质，对集成方无新接口或 SDK 变化。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.original_summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 推出 Partner Network，砸 1.5 亿美元帮全球合作伙伴落地企业 AI。纯渠道/销售动作，不影响 API 能力、价格、SLA，后端不用关心。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响，仅企业采购/合作方需要关注。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI Academy 上了三门新课，教人用 AI 搭工作流。培训内容，跟后端架构/SDK 完全无关。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.original_summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.chinese_summary: Preply 用 OpenAI 做 AI 课程摘要、个性化语言学习。这是客户案例文章，没有新模型/新 API 能力。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质，参考价值低。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.original_summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 宣布收购 Ona，把它的安全持久化云环境塞进 Codex，让 agent 能跨企业工作流长时间运行。这对 Codex/agent 平台能力是重要信号，意味着长期 agent 要来了。
items.backend_focus: 短期无 API 变更，但如果你在用 Codex 做长任务，关注后续 sandbox 持久化和状态恢复能力。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.original_summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.chinese_summary: BBVA 把 ChatGPT Enterprise 铺到 10 万员工，企业级落地案例。无新 API/技术细节，包装大于实质。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.original_summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.chinese_summary: 天体物理学家用 Codex 模拟黑洞，科普类应用案例。没有任何新能力或 SDK 更新。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.original_summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 公开支持欧盟 AI 内容透明 Code of Practice，推进 AI 生成内容溯源标准。跟欧盟业务相关的要留意合规要求，但短期无强制技术规范。
items.backend_focus: 如果产品面向欧盟用户，关注 C2PA/内容溯源元数据要求；短期内 API 无变化。

items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 美国政府发出口管制指令，要求暂停 Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 的访问。重要：直接影响模型可用性，集成方必须立即确认自己服务是否依赖。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查是否在用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5，准备回滚到 Opus 4.8 或其他可用模型；关注 API 返回的错误码和区域限制。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the be
items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，并提到 Claude Opus 4.8 发布。奖学金是公司 PR，但 Opus 4.8 是真升级——下面 index 14 有详情。
items.backend_focus: 重点关注 Opus 4.8 能力升级；奖学金本身无技术影响。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Project Glasswing 扩展到 15 个国家共 150 家组织，是 Anthropic 的企业试点计划。跟普通 API 用户无关。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Claude Opus 4.8 正式发布，编程、agent 任务、专业工作上更强。重要模型升级，集成方应做迁移评估和性能对比。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：评估从 Opus 4.x 升 4.8，对照 benchmark 验证 coding/agent 场景；注意 max_tokens、价格区间、是否需要更新 SDK 版本。

items.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas" The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on A
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 对教皇通谕的发言，纯公关/政策内容，无技术更新。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.original_summary: Announcements
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 首尔办公室开业，宣布韩国 AI 生态合作。区域市场动作，跟 API 集成无关。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.original_summary: Announcements
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic Public Record 第一期结果公布，类似透明度报告。摘要信息不全，但通常是安全/政策类内容，对集成方无直接影响。
items.backend_focus: 无直接后端影响，可扫一眼了解 Anthropic 政策走向。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.original_summary: Announcements
items.chinese_summary: TCS 和 Anthropic 合作把 Claude 引入受监管行业。销售渠道公告，无新 API 能力。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.original_summary: Announcements
items.chinese_summary: DXC 集成 Claude 进银行、航空等受监管系统。集成商渠道公告，对直接 API 用户无影响。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps
items.original_summary: Announcements
items.chinese_summary: Claude Corps 正式启动，PR 性质的人才项目，无技术更新。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: AI-Assisted Migration Tool Helps Teams Move from ingress-nginx to Higress in Minutes
items.original_summary: The Cloud Native Computing Foundation has highlighted a new AI-assisted migration approach that enabled engineers to migrate 60 ingress-nginx resources to Higress in roughly 30 minutes, demonstrating how artificial intelligence is increasingly being applied to modernize Kubernetes networking and gateway infrastructure. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CNCF 展示一个 AI 辅助迁移工具，把 60 个 ingress-nginx 资源自动迁到 Higress 仅用 30 分钟。对正在用 ingress-nginx 的团队有参考价值。
items.backend_focus: 如果用 ingress-nginx 且评估 Higress，可试用该 AI 迁移脚本；注意生产环境仍需人工 review Ingress 注解差异。

items.title: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions
items.original_summary: Pullfrog is an open-source AI-powered GitHub bot by Colin McDonnell, designed for automation in GitHub Actions. It supports a model-agnostic approach, allowing integration with various LLM providers. Key features include orchestration for pull request reviews, issue triage, and CI remediation, all managed within GitHub's environment. The tool operates with a bring-your-own-key model for access. By Daniel Curtis
items.chinese_summary: Pullfrog AI 开源，做 GitHub Actions 里的 PR 评审、issue triage、CI 修复的 AI 机器人，模型可插拔、自带 key。CodeRabbit 的替代品选之一。
items.backend_focus: 可在自己仓库试装：GitHub Marketplace 加 Pullfrog，配置 BYOK（OpenAI/Anthropic key），CI 工作流零侵入。

items.title: Anthropic Releases and Temporarily Suspends Claude Fable 5
items.original_summary: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, a model designed for long-horizon tasks, but it was taken offline shortly after due to a U.S. government export directive. It shares architecture with Claude Mythos 5, supporting extensive token usage. The model includes mandatory data retention requirements, which have affected its deployment with partners like Microsoft. By Andrew Hoblitzell
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 6 月 9 日发布 Claude Fable 5，主打长任务和大上下文，但很快因美国政府出口管制指令下架。重要：跟 index 11 是同一事件的延伸。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：确认 5 系列模型不可用；已接入 Fable 5 的服务必须切换到 Opus 4.8，注意上下文长度差异。

items.title: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents
items.original_summary: Google has announced the Google Colab CLI, a command-line tool that allows developers and AI agents to interact with remote Colab runtimes directly from a local terminal. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Google 发布 Colab CLI，让开发者和 AI agent 能从本地终端直接操作远程 Colab runtime。对把 Colab 当算力后端的场景有用。
items.backend_focus: 可集成到自动化训练 pipeline：colab-cli 触发远程 GPU 任务，适合低频大算力场景；评估 vs 自建 K8s job 的成本。

items.title: Pinecone Brings AI Agents Directly to Enterprise Data with Microsoft OneLake Integration
items.original_summary: Pinecone has announced a new integration between its Nexus knowledge engine and Microsoft OneLake, aiming to fundamentally change how enterprise AI agents access and reason over corporate data. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Pinecone Nexus 知识引擎和微软 OneLake 集成，让企业 agent 能直接查 Microsoft 数据湖。技术细节有限，但方向上是 RAG 企业落地的趋势。
items.backend_focus: 如果用 OneLake 存数据，可评估 Pinecone Nexus 减少自建 ETL；但需关注定价和数据出域合规。

items.title: Building and Scaling a Platform with Project-as-a-Service
items.original_summary: When a platform started with total developer autonomy, teams felt overwhelmed and ended up solving the same problems in completely different ways. The company shifted to enablement over support, working together with teams intensively, and helping teams feel confident and capable, turning the right way into being the easiest way. By Ben Linders
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 关于 Platform-as-a-Service 演进的文章，团队从完全自治走向 enablement。方法论文章，无新工具，但平台团队可参考。
items.backend_focus: 平台团队参考 InnerSource / paved road 模式；无具体工具变更。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: A Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 实战文章讲云上 AI 治理：shadow AI 发现、数据分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code。架构师/平台团队必读，跟监管合规直接相关。
items.backend_focus: 立即可做：加 OPA/Kyverno 策略挡未授权 LLM endpoint；用云厂商 CASB 扫描员工调用 LLM；引入数据脱敏网关。

items.title: Article: Artificial Intelligence-Driven Phishing: How Phishing Technique Is Evolving and Implemented
items.original_summary: In this article, the author examines how AI is transforming phishing from a manual, targeted activity into an automated and scalable attack model. The article breaks down each stage of the phishing lifecycle, showing how AI improves reconnaissance, profiling, content generation, delivery, and interaction, while outlining layered defenses that combine controls, processes, and user awareness. By Marco Rizzi
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 安全文章讲 AI 驱动的钓鱼攻击演化，覆盖侦察、内容生成、投递全链路。后端安全/网关团队要关注，因为钓鱼 payload 会攻击你们的用户。
items.backend_focus: 建议加固：邮件网关加 LLM 风格特征检测、SPF/DKIM/DMARC 强校验、对短链/二维码做重定向审计。

items.title: Article: The Technology Adoption Curve, Twenty Years On
items.original_summary: Today, June 8th, InfoQ celebrates 20 years. This is not a comprehensive history, but a deliberately selective look at the technologies and practices InfoQ identified early, where they sit on the adoption curve in 2026, and how that curve may evolve over the next five to ten years. By Renato Losio, Dio Synodinos
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 20 周年回顾文章，盘点过去技术采用曲线。纯内容策划，无技术更新。
items.backend_focus: 无后端影响。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 推出 for Agents 的 API-first 知识库，让 AI 编程 agent 能复用已有解法而非每次重新发现。概念上重要，是 agent 时代基础设施信号。
items.backend_focus: 如果在做内部 coding agent，可接入 Stack Overflow for Agents beta API 减少重复 token 消耗；评估成本 vs 自建内部知识库。
